prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `e57337a4`.
codex_response:
Implemented `e57337a4` as an ARC2 task package. The rule is: split the 15x15 monochrome input into a 3x3 grid of 5x5 blocks, then output a 3x3 grid in the same background color with `0` wherever the corresponding 5x5 block contains any black cell. The summary hint was used; it matched the official examples, so no `notes.md` was needed and no new primitive was necessary.

The verifier and generator are in [verifier.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_e57337a4/verifier.py#L1), [generator.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_e57337a4/generator.py#L1), and [__init__.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_e57337a4/__init__.py#L1). The generator stays close to the task family by using uniform backgrounds in colors `6-9` and placing `1-3` singleton zero pixels, one per selected 5x5 block.

Validation passed: official examples `4/4`, generated examples `1000/1000`, and the preview sheet looks on-distribution. Artifacts are at [task.json](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/e57337a4/task.json), [originals.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/e57337a4/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/e57337a4/previews/preview_01.png), [preview_02.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/e57337a4/previews/preview_02.png), and [preview_03.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/e57337a4/previews/preview_03.png).
